title: Monday & Integromat - Send an email after status change
excerpt:
Hi guys, 
When a status changes to a specific label, send an email (gmail) to client (email field on monday) 
Here is a video explaining my struggle :slight_smile: 
https://www.loom.com/share/feee9013713f40b1aaf477d93aff…

posts.author: Medint (Medint Medical Intelligence Ltd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

When a status changes to a specific label, send an email (gmail) to client (email field on monday)

Here is a video explaining my struggle
https://www.loom.com/share/feee9013713f40b1aaf477d93aff659b

Thanks!!

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml: Confused. Why not just use the Gmail integration?

posts.author: Medint (Medint Medical Intelligence Ltd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Gmail integration doesnt allow you to use BCC or HTML tags.

בתאריך יום ה׳, 9 ביוני 2022, 18:04, מאת Phillip A Sperry via monday Community ‏<notifications@monday.discoursemail.com>:

| Phillip A Sperry psperry
June 9 |

  • | - |

Confused. Why not just use the Gmail integration?

Visit Topic or reply to this email to respond.

To unsubscribe from these emails, click here.

מדינט משלבת יכולות מודיעין בעולם הרפואה, ומפעילה ברמה היומיומית מערך חוקרים שנועד לאתר ולנתח מידע רפואי חיוני, עדכני ואובייקטיבי עבור חולים שאובחנו במחלות מורכבות ועבור רופאים. מדינט היא ספק יחיד של משרד הבריאות הישראלי ומשרתת את כל בתי החולים בארץ ומשרדי בריאות נוספים בעולם.

Medint integrates intelligence capabilities in the medical world, and on a daily basis operates an array of researchers designed to locate and analyze vital, up-to-date and objective medical information for physicians and for patients diagnosed with complex diseases. Medint is a sole provider of the Israeli Ministry of Health and serves all hospitals in the country and to other health ministries in the world.

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml: Fair enough. If I ever need that level of integration, I will consider your solution.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Medint

My recommendation for the first module would be to use a webhook. On the monday side you can create an integration with this recipe:

image803×448 20.9 KB

If you do that, you would also probably need to add a Get an item module to get whatever item information you want to send your email.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
